versions.version_description: Added lyrics, chord changes where they occur.
This is simplified for keyboard and/or piano drawn from the live version of the song as played live on Daryls House.

Brilliant pop song from Daryl here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Chorus plays as first part of intro. Refrain and bridges play as second part of intro. Outro plays as chorus repeating to a quick fade.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Hall & Oates - Wait for Me
From the album "Legendary Hall & Oates," 2002
As interpreted and tabulated by Reed Peterson


[tab]  [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]      [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]
e|---6---     |---5---     |---3---|
B|---8---     |---6---     |---4---|
G|---7---     |---5---     |---5---|
D|---8---     |---7---     |---5---|
A|---6---     |---5---     |---3---|
E|---6---     |---5---     |---X---|[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
e|---3---     |---1---     |---5---|
B|---4---     |---1---     |---6---|

D|---5---     |---0---     |---7---|
A|---3---     |---X---     |---5---|
E|---3---     |---X---     |---X---|[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]*
e|---6---     |---1---     |---8---|
B|---6---     |---1---     |---10--|
G|---7---     |---2---     |---10--|
D|---8---     |---3---     |---10--|

[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]

A|---10--|
E|---8---|[/tab]


[Intro]

Play this progression - listen to the song to determine chord changes - it's 
identical to the chorus, except that the final "F" is held until the verse begins

[ch]Bb6add11[/ch]  [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]  [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]  [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]  [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]
Midnight hour's almost over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
Time is running out for the magic pair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]
I know you gave the best that you have[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
but one more chance couldn't be all that hard to bear[/tab]


[Chorus 1]

[tab][ch]Bb6add11[/ch]              [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
So wait for me, please[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]
Wait for me, oh I[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I guess that's more than I should ask,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]           [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
but won't you wait for me, please[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]
wait for me, oh I[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
I know the light is fading fast[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]
You could go either way; is it easier to stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
I wonder what you'll do when your chance rolls around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]
But you gotta know much I - I want to keep you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
When I'm away, I'm afraid it will all fall down[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab][ch]Bb6add11[/ch]              [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
So wait for me, please[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]
Wait for me, oh I[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I guess that's more than I should ask,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]           [ch]Dm7/A[/ch]
but won't you wait for me, please[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm7/G[/ch]
wait for me, oh I[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
I know the light is fading fast[/tab]

[Bridge 1]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]Cm[/ch]
la la la la la la la la la la la la la[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]*
la la la la la la la la la la la la la[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]Cm[/ch]
la la la la la la la la la la la la la[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]*
la la la la la la la la la la la la la[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Love is what it does and ours is doing nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]*
But all the time we spent, it must be good for something[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Please forgive all the disturbance I'm creating[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Bb6add11[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]*
But you gotta lot to learn if you think that I'm not waiting for you.[/tab]
